violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Deli -Wiping cloth at slicer used "for the day". *Keep in sanitizer bucket between uses OR Replace every 2 hours or when visibly soiled. Produce -Wiping cloth stated as changed out daily. *Keep cloth in sanitizer between uses and do NOT store in sani sink.
Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food * (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked.

Contaminated food disposition. — --Written documentation not available for Deli hot case. *Breakfast items stated as out from 7a and thrown away at 11a. Appetizers held for 3 hours but not logged or time stamped.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Deli -Crumb/debris in bottoms of utensil storage containers. Produce -Dust/debris at walk in cooler fans. -Oil spill/grease around fryer area.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Deli -Gatorade and cookie dough bites commingling with food service items in walk in cooler
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
